arts.ttl: Salah, VVD or Trent? Liverpool's 'number one contract priority' revealed
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly made extending Virgil van Dijk's contract their top priority, ahead of confirming deals for Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold.

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella admits one person isn't actually in the Chelsea WhatsApp group chat
Team News: Liverpool vs. Chelsea injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Liverpool and Chelsea.

After loans to Reading and Leicester, the 2022 signing is still not a regular for Chelsea and was the subject of transfer speculation in the summer. According to TuttoMercatoWeb, the Italian midfielder's new representatives Epic Sports, whom he joined in the summer, have already fielded several enquiries for the youngster from suitors.

arts.ttl: Mainz supporters turn on Jurgen Klopp with damning banners about former Liverpool boss
arts.sum: Supporters of one of Jurgen Klopp's former clubs hold up a banner criticising the legendary Liverpool manager for his decision to take a job with the Red Bull group

arts.ttl: 'Next Messi' - Liverpool ahead of Dortmund for signature of 17-year-old sensation?
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly ahead of Borussia Dortmund in the race to sign teenage rising star Andrija Maksimovic from Serbian outfit Red Star Belgrade.

arts.ttl: 'Stupid': ESPN pundit thinks Liverpool will target £25m Chelsea player
arts.sum: Craig Burley has predicted that Liverpool could target Chelsea’s player on the pitch during this weekend’s huge showdown at Anfield. Liverpool host Chelsea on Sunday...

arts.ttl: Liverpool prioritising contract extension agreement with soon-to-be free-agent
arts.sum: Liverpool do not want to lose Virgil Van Dijk and have therefore prioritised agreeing a new contract. The 33-year-old captain is one of several key players in the final 10 months of their contract. Along with Mo Salah and Real Madrid-linked Trent Alexander-Arnold, Van Dijk will be eligible to agree a pre-contract with clubs outside […] The post Liverpool prioritising contract extension agreement with soon-to-be free-agent appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca sends Cole Palmer warning to Chelsea squad ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Palmer's form has helped Chelsea climb up to fourth in the Premier League table, four points behind leaders Liverpool, but Maresca rejected suggestions the game could go a long way to deciding the fate of the title at the end of the season. Enzo Maresca has warned the Chelsea squad not to rely on Cole Palmer to carry them through their tough run of fixtures.

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea are now seeing 'real' Caicedo - Potter
arts.sum: Ex-Brighton and Chelsea boss Graham Potter tells BBC Sport why Chelsea are now seeing the best of Moises Caicedo after his £100m move.
